ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game took place */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visit_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "visit_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the visiting team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visit_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the play occurred */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (Regular or Postseason) */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the season */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the play occurred */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "preview_link" TEXT /* Link to the video preview of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run, punt, field goal) */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance needed for a first down */,
  "yard_line" INTEGER /* Yard line where the play started */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass, fumble) */,
  "player_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of player IDs involved in the play */,
  "play_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (Regular or Postseason) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league for that season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the quarter occurred */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the quarter */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the quarter */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the quarter */,
  "quarter_score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the end of the quarter */,
  "quarter_score_visit" INTEGER /* Score of the visiting team at the end of the quarter */,
  "quarter_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_links" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video preview */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play associated with the video */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video preview of the play */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the video */,
  "video_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video preview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_links_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, fan) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the play */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the play was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the play */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_access_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
